description.short: Azure DevOps AI assistant for Project Managers — and your whole team.
description.full: Designed for Project Managers who need live Azure DevOps data without leaving their AI assistant: sprint health reports, go/no-go readiness checklists, velocity trends, stakeholder updates, backlog grooming, and committee-ready PowerPoint decks grounded in real ADO data. Developers and functional consultants benefit too: query work items, monitor pipelines, review pull requests, browse repositories, manage test plans, and write wiki pages — all through natural language.

agentConnectors.name: Azure DevOps MCP
agentConnectors.description: Remote MCP connector to the Microsoft Azure DevOps MCP server.
